fixApplied.message: Fix LiveView flash bug: put live_session routes through browser pipeline
fixApplied.resolvedBlockingIssue: LiveView on_mount callbacks crashed with ArgumentError when redirecting unauthenticated/non-admin users because flash was not fetched. Fix moved live_session routes through browser pipeline ensuring flash is fetched before on_mount runs.

notes: Round 2 re-tested the 4 previously blocked assertions after fix commit 826e2a5. All assertions now pass. The LiveView flash bug has been resolved.
